creator: grant@gray.id.au
text:
Intermittent livelock/deadlock encountered typically every 1-2 days, up to twice a day after introducing ZFS pools of SSD members (no spinning disks).

Mailing list submission regarding this issue:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-fs/2013-September/018202.html

Speculation such as bug may exist:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=211762

Possibly same/similar bug:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2013-January/071529.html

Discussion of similar issue in the context of OpenSolaris:
http://www.mail-archive.com/zfs-code@mail.opensolaris.org/msg00789.html

Attached to this PR are filesystem details.
